payload.description: Scheduled cooling loop inspection during dispatch window.
payload.resolution: Cooling loop flushed and fluid topped up.
payload.notes: Cooling loop temperature sensitivity noted under active dispatch. Monitor closely.

payload.description: Watch-level thermal alarm triggered during peak discharge.
payload.resolution: Alarm acknowledged; cooling loop verified functional.
payload.notes: Prior watch-level thermal events observed. Escalate if temperature exceeds 48C.
